positive: Looting every single chest and barrel

Upgrading skills as soon as leveling up
Fast traveling to clear out bag space

negative: Stealing everything that is not nailed down

Attacking friendly NPCs just to test damage
Jumping continuously while traveling to move faster

Picking fights with town guards for fun
Wasting expensive mana potions on weak enemies
Falling to death by trying to shortcut down cliffs
